goals_used.direction: Increase future work quality by converting successful traces into verified network skills.
goals_used.name: Compound productive capability

goals_used.direction: Every propagated capability must leave inspectable evidence: receipt, report, badge, and webpage.
goals_used.name: Preserve public proof integrity

goals_used.direction: Unsafe or plan-inconsistent upgrades must be rejected before network propagation.
goals_used.name: Keep releases governed

goals_used.direction: The system must explain goals, plans, skills, proofs, and outcomes clearly to a viewer.
goals_used.name: Improve non-technical legibility

goals_used.direction: Skills should improve future work outside their original task family when evidence supports transfer.
goals_used.name: Increase transfer across domains

goals_used.direction: The protocol should stay usable for pilots where humans approve final outputs.
goals_used.name: Protect human-supervised pilot readiness

incremental_position: Second Proof Gradient proof: extends proof-gated skill propagation with explicit GoalOS direction, PlanOS strategy, SkillOS capability, and Proof Gradient evolution gates.

plans_used.name: Shadow Pilot Route
plans_used.strategy: Start with human-supervised work, capture traces, and approve only tested improvements.

plans_used.name: Governed Release Route
plans_used.strategy: Send every upgrade through policy, permission, rollback, and verifier coverage gates.

plans_used.name: Public Evidence Route
plans_used.strategy: Render the proof into a public viewer journey with JSON receipt, report, badge, and webpage.

plans_used.name: Transfer Atlas Route
plans_used.strategy: Test whether accepted skills generalize across different domains and holdout cases.

plans_used.name: Root Authority Route
plans_used.strategy: Keep the public root as the Command Center while proof pages live in their own rooms.

public_claim_boundary: This is a deterministic benchmark proof, not audited customer ROI.

It does not claim achieved superintelligence, Kardashev Type II civilization, investment returns, financial advice, legal advice, medical advice, employment advice, credit advice, policy advice, or token advice.
It tests whether goal-plan-skill aligned proof gradients outperform static and unverified propagation baselines under controlled holdout conditions.

skills_used.input: mission statement, public claim boundary, desired outcomes
skills_used.name: Goal Contract Compilation
skills_used.purpose: Convert high-level objectives into measurable acceptance gates.
skills_used.verifier: goal weights sum to 1.0 and each goal has a threshold

skills_used.name: Plan Route Decomposition
skills_used.purpose: Turn each goal into a testable route with steps, risk budgets, and dependencies.
skills_used.verifier: each plan links to goals and contains a risk budget

skills_used.input: trace-derived skills, plan routes, policy constraints
skills_used.name: Skill Binding
skills_used.purpose: Bind reusable skills to the goals and plans they are allowed to support.
skills_used.verifier: skill must declare input, output, and verifier

skills_used.input: agent attempt, task, outcome, role, risk signal
skills_used.name: Attempt Trace Capture
skills_used.purpose: Record agent work as structured evidence so successful behavior can become reusable.

skills_used.input: candidate skill, goal alignment, plan fidelity, holdout result
skills_used.name: Proof-Gated Selection
skills_used.output: accept, revise, reject, or retire decision
skills_used.purpose: Accept only upgrades that improve holdout results while respecting goals, plans, and risk gates.
skills_used.verifier: proof score threshold and negative-control rejection

skills_used.input: release metrics, proof outcomes, risk events
skills_used.name: Gradient Attribution
skills_used.purpose: Compute which goals, plans, and skills contributed to improvement or regression.
skills_used.verifier: gradient sign must match holdout delta

skills_used.input: accepted skill, role map, plan compatibility
skills_used.name: Network Propagation Control
skills_used.purpose: Propagate accepted skills to compatible agents without allowing unverified capability drift.

skills_used.input: poisoned candidates and misleading high-value shortcuts
skills_used.name: Adversarial Goal Injection
skills_used.purpose: Test whether attractive but goal-inconsistent upgrades are blocked.

skills_used.input: candidate upgrade, policy boundary, rollback path
skills_used.name: Capability Governance Twin
skills_used.purpose: Simulate a capability release before it changes live routing.
skills_used.verifier: policy, rollback, permission, and verifier coverage gates

skills_used.name: Executive Evidence Rendering
skills_used.purpose: Render goals, plans, skills, proof results, and claim boundaries into a viewer-friendly public artifact.

subtitle: Direction → Strategy → Capability → Evolution
tagline: One agent tries. Proof decides. The network evolves.
title: Proof Gradient · Goal-Plan-Skill Alignment Lattice
